# Flexrra

> One subscription gives you access to 20+ premium partner gyms across Lucknow. Pause anytime, no commitment, cancel whenever.

Flexrra is a multi-gym membership service. Members pay a single monthly or annual fee and check in at any partner gym using a QR-code system.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse partner gyms in Lucknow and learn how Flexrra works.
- [Membership Plans](/plans): Monthly and annual pricing, included benefits, and FAQs.
- [Install App](/install): Install the Flexrra progressive web app on mobile.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Existing member sign in.
- [Create account](/signup): New member sign up.
